evidence: FEAT-005's outstanding [orchestrator] real-session smoke confirmed by the operator (davidryan@gmail.com): running pi-context pi-bound from a cwd outside the repo with the published packages present launches an interactive pi session constrained to the composed extension tool surface (the two-package-root SKILL.md tool union + the active substrate's config.tool_operations[] composites), in which the agent can invoke the union tools and cannot invoke tools outside it, with --grant extending the union and passthrough args reaching pi unchanged. The operator ran and confirmed the live interactive/credentialed session — the piece the orchestrator could not exercise in a non-interactive harness; TASK-030 (VER-019) had stub-verified the dispatch/composition path. Recorded at the operator's direction ('done'); the orchestrator did not itself run the interactive session.

criteria_results.criterion: From a cwd outside the repo with the packages installed, pi-context pi-bound launches an interactive pi session whose available tools are exactly the composed union (the two-package-root SKILL.md tool set plus config.tool_operations[] composites), equivalent to scripts/launch-constrained-pi.sh
criteria_results.evidence: operator-confirmed live run from outside the repo

criteria_results.criterion: In that session the agent can invoke the extension tools in the union and cannot invoke tools outside it
criteria_results.evidence: operator-confirmed the constrained tool surface in the live session

criteria_results.criterion: --grant <id> extends the union for that launch; passthrough arguments reach pi unchanged
criteria_results.evidence: code-verified in TASK-030 (VER-019) + operator-confirmed in the live session
